message:
🐛 Fix TestGetGatewayAPIStatus panic: inject rawConfig in test setup (#1369)

The test was panicking with 'interface conversion: interface {} is nil,
not []interface {}' because ListClusters / HealthyClusters could not
discover injected fake clusters (no rawConfig set). The handler returned
a 500 error instead of the expected clusters array.

Fix: Set a minimal rawConfig in setupTestEnv and addClusterToRawConfig
helper so injected clusters are discoverable via ListClusters. Also add
GetRawConfig accessor for test helpers.

This has been blocking nightly releases since Feb 20 (4 consecutive
failures).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
